log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
--- Kor — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ROUND 2 ===

ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Kor — Bardic Musician.
→ Kor — Bardic Musician: CON save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 14 necrotic damage (half).
--- Kor — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:4+9=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
=== ROUND 3 ===
Lich is incapacitated — skipping turn.

--- Kor — Bardic Musician's turn ---

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:20+9=29 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
